evals.prompt: Optimize the landing page meta tags for 'Handwerker Software' on the FreyAI Visions homepage.
evals.expected_output: Complete meta tag block with title (keyword-first, under 60 chars), description (140-160 chars with CTA), canonical URL (HTTPS, trailing slash), Open Graph tags (title, description, image 1200x630, locale de_DE), and Twitter Card tags

assertions.name: title-keyword-first
assertions.description: Page title must start with 'Handwerker Software' or 'Handwerkersoftware' and end with brand name 'FreyAI Visions', under 60 characters

assertions.name: meta-description-with-cta
assertions.description: Meta description must be 140-160 characters, contain 'Handwerkersoftware' or 'Handwerker Software', and end with a call to action in German

assertions.name: canonical-url
assertions.description: Must include a canonical link tag with HTTPS URL and trailing slash pointing to freyaivisions.de

assertions.name: open-graph-complete
assertions.description: Must include og:title, og:description, og:image (1200x630), og:url, og:type, og:locale (de_DE), og:site_name

assertions.name: twitter-card-tags
assertions.description: Must include twitter:card (summary_large_image), twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image

assertions.name: no-english-in-visible-text
assertions.description: No English loanwords in user-visible meta content (description, title) except 'Software' as established German search keyword

assertions.name: self-hosted-assets
assertions.description: OG image and all referenced assets must point to freyaivisions.de domain, no external CDN or third-party URLs

evals.prompt: Add structured data to the FreyAI Visions homepage for better Google rich results.
evals.expected_output: JSON-LD script blocks for SoftwareApplication (with correct applicationCategory, offers, author), Organization (with address, founder, contactPoint), FAQPage (with at least 2 questions about the product), and BreadcrumbList

assertions.name: software-application-schema
assertions.description: Must include SoftwareApplication with name, description, applicationCategory: BusinessApplication, operatingSystem, and offers with EUR pricing

assertions.name: organization-schema
assertions.description: Must include Organization with name 'FreyAI Visions', url, logo, founder (Jonas Glawion), address (Grossostheim), and contactPoint

assertions.name: faq-schema
assertions.description: Must include FAQPage with at least 2 Question/Answer pairs relevant to Handwerker software, all in German

assertions.name: breadcrumb-schema
assertions.description: Must include BreadcrumbList with proper ListItem hierarchy starting from Startseite

assertions.name: valid-jsonld-format
assertions.description: All structured data must be valid JSON-LD in <script type='application/ld+json'> tags with correct @context and @type

assertions.name: german-content-only
assertions.description: All user-visible text in structured data (names, descriptions, answers) must be in German with no English loanwords except 'Software'

evals.prompt: Write SEO-optimized landing page copy for Elektriker in Frankfurt targeting 'Handwerker Software Frankfurt'.
evals.expected_output: Complete landing page copy in German with Hero section (H1 with city keyword), Pain Points (3 specific Elektriker problems), Features (4-6 with benefits), Social Proof (founder story), and CTA (booking link). All German, no English words, city-specific references throughout.

assertions.name: h1-with-city-keyword
assertions.description: H1 must contain 'Handwerker Software Frankfurt' or 'Handwerkersoftware Frankfurt' and 'Elektriker'

assertions.name: pain-points-trade-specific
assertions.description: Must include at least 3 pain points specific to Elektriker (e.g., Aufmass, Schaltplaene, Materiallisten) — not generic business problems

assertions.name: no-english-words
assertions.description: Zero English loanwords in the copy — no 'Features', 'Tool', 'Dashboard', 'Update', 'App', 'Link', 'Download', 'Team' etc. Only 'Software' allowed as search keyword

assertions.name: city-references
assertions.description: Must mention Frankfurt and surrounding area at least 3 times naturally in the copy (not keyword-stuffed)

assertions.name: cta-structure
assertions.description: Must end with a clear CTA section pointing to buchung.freyaivisions.de with scarcity element (limited beta spots)

assertions.name: landing-page-structure
assertions.description: Must follow the 5-section structure: Hero, Schmerzpunkte, Funktionsuebersicht, Vertrauen/Beweise, Handlungsaufforderung

assertions.name: meta-tags-included
assertions.description: Must include meta title and description optimized for 'Handwerker Software Frankfurt Elektriker' with proper character limits
